manufacturer_evidence: Overview CHEAT CODE Model The Cheat Code from SHARPEYE Surfboards delivers the world's fastest surfboard developed to offer High Volume Performance in small-sized conditions. A tuned-up, up-volumed performance shortboard. The Cheat Code features a forgiving boxy rail that minimises rail catches in full / flat sections and sub-par conditions. The bottom contour features a medium single concave that ends between the fins ending with a flat exit. These concaves combine with a flat entry rocker that flows seamlessly into a flat exit rocker, providing an instant burst of speed from take-off with exceptional control, drive and carry in small-sized conditions. We recommend riding this board 2-4 inches shorter than your regular shortboard and adding a touch of width and thickness. Model Outline Performance Range. Performance step-down outline delivering High Volume Performance in small-sized conditions. Bottom Contours Medium Single Concave to Flat Exit. Fin Setup 2+1 / Thruster / Quad. Recommended fins: FCS: Filipe Toledo PC Fins or SharpEye PC Fins Futures: SharpEye Fins or F8 Fins

manufacturer_evidence: Overview MAGURO Model The Maguro twin fin from SHARPEYE Surfboards delivers the world's fastest surfboard with Traditional Performance. This model has been developed as a hybrid of the classic San Diego fish and a modern twin, offering traditional yet contemporary performance in small conditions. Featuring a classic swallow (split tail), 5" deep and 10" wide, integrated with a modern soft rail and a classic vee bottom contour through to the tail, the Maguro can make sharp directional changes while maintaining exceptional speed, drive and hold. Combined with flat entry and exit rockers that provide an instant burst of speed from take-off, this infusion of design elements essentially juxtaposes traditional and modern design features to enable a traditional yet progressive blend of performance surfing. The Maguro has been designed to run a classic twin keel fin set-up. However, this model is also available in a quad-fin configuration if desired. This board should be ridden 3 to 4 inches smaller than your height. Model Outline Alternate Range. Alternate outline delivering Traditional Performance. Bottom Contours Vee. Fin Setup Twin. Recommended fins: FCS: EN Twin Fins or K2 Fiberglass Keel Fins Futures: Power Twin Fins or Modern Keel Twin Fins
